raw_response_text:
<explanation>
The target image features clusters of small, bright orange/yellow flowers with four petals each, which matches the visual characteristics of the examples labeled as class 45. It does not match the purple flowers of class 44 or the large pink/white lotus flowers of class 77.
</explanation>

<response>45</response>

raw_response_text:
<explanation>
The target image shows a large flower with white petals that have pinkish tips and a prominent yellow central seed pod. This visual pattern matches the second example of class 77, which also features white petals with pink edges and a central yellow structure. It does not match class 44 (purple flowers) or class 45 (orange/yellow flowers).
</explanation>

<response>77</response>

message.content:
<explanation>
The target image shows a large flower with white petals that have pinkish tips and a prominent yellow central seed pod. This visual pattern matches the second example of class 77, which also features white petals with pink edges and a central yellow structure. It does not match class 44 (purple flowers) or class 45 (orange/yellow flowers).
</explanation>

<response>77</response>
